speaker: Dana Whitfield
quote: Gross margin compressed 110 basis points this quarter and we want to be direct about why: we accepted lower margin on two enterprise deals to lock in three-year contracts. We expect this to recover by Q3 as those contracts ramp.

speaker: Dana Whitfield
quote: Two competitors have started discounting in the mid-market. We are not matching. If that costs us 200 to 300 basis points of share growth this year, we will accept it. The unit economics of matching do not work for us.

speaker: Marcus Olin
quote: We did not repurchase shares this quarter. The stock is up 40 percent year to date and we do not see compelling value at these levels. We will revisit if the multiple compresses.

speaker: Greta Hsu
quote: We feel really good about where gross margin is trending. The team has done excellent work and we are very comfortable with the trajectory.

speaker: Greta Hsu
quote: Net revenue retention came in a little softer than we would have liked but the underlying signals are strong and we are seeing green shoots in the cohorts.

speaker: Peter Lansing
quote: We are reiterating full year guidance. There may be some lumpiness in the quarterly cadence but on a full year basis we feel confident.

speaker: Owen Ferreira
quote: Our new platform tier is performing ahead of expectations. We added 240 net new logos this quarter against an internal plan of 180.

speaker: Owen Ferreira
quote: We did see elevated churn in the SMB segment driven by macro pressure on smaller customers. We expect this to normalize over the next two quarters.

speaker: Lisa Tran
quote: Operating margin expanded 220 basis points and we now expect to exit the year above the high end of the prior range.

speaker: Henrik Vossen
quote: We are reinvesting our gross profit dollars into the next generation product. This will pressure operating margin for the next four to six quarters and we want to be clear about that with shareholders.

speaker: Henrik Vossen
quote: We do not believe we are losing share. Our renewal rate ticked up 80 basis points and our gross adds were a record this quarter.

speaker: Priya Aggarwal
quote: This was a transformational quarter for the company and we are incredibly excited about the runway ahead. The total addressable market is massive and we are just scratching the surface.

speaker: Priya Aggarwal
quote: Profitability is not the primary lens for the business right now. We are focused on capturing the opportunity in front of us. We will get there over time.

speaker: Reggie Park
quote: CAC payback has lengthened a bit this quarter due to some go to market investments but we expect this to normalize.

speaker: Iris Cohen
quote: Last year we said we would take operating margin from 4 percent to 9 percent within 18 months. We are at 8.2 percent today, three quarters in. We will exit Q4 above 10 percent.

speaker: Iris Cohen
quote: We repurchased 2.4 percent of shares outstanding this quarter at an average price 18 percent below the current trading level. We were patient and the patience paid.

speaker: Marcus Sutter
quote: We are evolving our go to market motion to better align with the customer journey. There is a lot of work in flight and we are encouraged by the early indicators.

speaker: Marcus Sutter
quote: I want to thank Dan for his leadership over the past two years. The board and I felt this was the right moment to bring in a new perspective on the CFO seat.

speaker: Pat Yu
quote: We are withdrawing prior full year guidance while the new operating plan is finalized. We expect to provide updated commentary on the Q2 call.
